remaining_tasks.name: Implement atomic replacement, state save, and rollback
Add post-success cache, data cleanup, notifications, and final exports

decisions.decision: Use withLockedStateTransaction for reinstall rather than withStateGuard.
decisions.rationale: Reinstall must rollback physical bridge replacements if explicit state save fails; withStateGuard auto-saves after callback and cannot expose that boundary.

decisions.decision: Bridge replacement handles are opaque and keep internals in bridge-private WeakMaps.
decisions.rationale: Orchestrators can hold replacement handles without reading private prepared fields or backup paths.

decisions.decision: Agents replacement defaults to blocking foreign previous content; force only applies to this plugin's previous index rows.
decisions.rationale: Protects manual/foreign agent content by default while supporting explicit reinstall force semantics with rollback protection.

decisions.decision: MCP rollback restores exact previous mcp.json text when possible.
decisions.rationale: Preserves old user shape/format and satisfies old-resource preservation across reinstall failure.

context_notes: Phase 8 is 3/4 plans complete. Plans 08-01 through 08-03 are committed and summarized. Wave 3 / Plan 08-04 just began; only type scaffolding in orchestrators/types.ts exists. The orchestrator must use cached manifests only, preserve old installed version, prepare all bridge handles before replacement, use replace/rollback/finalize helpers from all four bridges, call tx.save() explicitly, rollback in reverse order on replacement/save failures, delete plugin data only after successful state commit, and surface cleanup/cache failures as warnings. No background processes are running. Current phase placeholder scan found no placeholder/TBD entries in Phase 08 docs. A broad grep across all phases reports historical placeholder/TBD strings in old docs/plans; not current-phase blockers.
